scripts.Tests: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report') { Remove-Item 'playwright-report' -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report.zip') { Remove-Item 'playwright-report.zip' -Force }; npx playwright test; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report') { Compress-Archive -Path 'playwright-report\*' -DestinationPath 'playwright-report.zip' -Force }; exit $code"
scripts.smoke: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report') { Remove-Item 'playwright-report' -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report.zip') { Remove-Item 'playwright-report.zip' -Force }; npx playwright test --grep '@smoke'; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report') { Compress-Archive -Path 'playwright-report\*' -DestinationPath 'playwright-report.zip' -Force }; exit $code"
scripts.sanity: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report') { Remove-Item 'playwright-report' -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report.zip') { Remove-Item 'playwright-report.zip' -Force }; npx playwright test --grep '@sanity'; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report') { Compress-Archive -Path 'playwright-report\*' -DestinationPath 'playwright-report.zip' -Force }; exit $code"
scripts.regression: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report') { Remove-Item 'playwright-report' -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report.zip') { Remove-Item 'playwright-report.zip' -Force }; npx playwright test --grep-invert '@smoke|@sanity'; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; if (Test-Path 'playwright-report') { Compress-Archive -Path 'playwright-report\*' -DestinationPath 'playwright-report.zip' -Force }; exit $code"
